title: MECE Studio feature catalogue
description: Curated list of user-facing capabilities. The denominator for documentation-coverage metrics (manual / book). Validated by scripts/check-feature-coverage.mjs.

areas.description: Allowed functional areas. Every feature's `area` must be one of these.

reviewedThroughChangelogEntries.description: Watermark: how many CHANGELOG feature-bullets the catalogue has been reconciled against. The gate warns when the CHANGELOG has advanced past this.

bookExample.description: That chapter has a worked example (requires book=true).
